translations.en: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him and his family) prohibited eating in a state of ritual impurity, and said: 'It bequeaths poverty.' He prohibited cutting nails with teeth, using the toothstick in the bathroom, and blowing the nose in mosques. He prohibited eating from the leftovers of mice. He said: 'Do not enter mosques without praying at least two units.' He prohibited urinating under a fruit tree or at the roadside. He prohibited eating with the left hand and eating while reclining. He prohibited plastering graves and praying in them. He said: 'When one of you bathes in an open space, be mindful of your private area. None of you should drink water from the handle of a vessel, for it collects dirt.' He prohibited urinating in still water, for it causes loss of intellect. He prohibited walking with one sandal and putting on sandals while standing. He prohibited urinating while the private is exposed to the sun or moon. He said: 'When you defecate, avoid the direction of the qibla.' He prohibited screaming during calamities. He prohibited wailing and listening to wailing. He prohibited women from following funeral processions. He prohibited erasing anything from the Book of Allah with saliva or writing in it. He prohibited lying deliberately about dreams, and said: 'Allah will order him on the Day of Resurrection to tie a knot in a barley grain, and he will not be able to.' He prohibited making images, and said: 'Whoever makes an image, Allah will order him on the Day of Resurrection to breathe life into it, and he will not be able to.' He prohibited burning any part of an animal alive. He prohibited insulting the rooster, and said: 'It wakes for prayer.' He prohibited interfering in a deal of a Muslim brother. He prohibited excessive talk during intercourse, and said: 'It causes muteness in the child.' He said: 'Do not leave garbage in your houses overnight; take it out during the day, for it is a sitting place of Satan.' He said: 'None of you should sleep with the residue of meat on his hands, for if he does and is afflicted by mild insanity from Satan, he has no one to blame but himself.' He prohibited cleaning oneself with dung.
